title: pavonia commutata
intro: Pavonia commutata, also known as Rocky Mountain Pavonia, is a perennial flowering plant native to North America, particularly in the western region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off infections, offering health benefits such as relief from arthritis and other inflammatory diseases. Pavonia commutata is typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is also used in herbal remedies to promote wound healing and soothe skin irritations.
